body.title: D330: TWM-view context test — interactive vs blob
body.result: TWM-only saves 60.5% tokens vs full blob (1102 vs 2788 across 6 questions). Tiered context confirmed: TWM→+memories→+ring scales cost proportionally. Quality assessment limited by 1b model — need cloud model test for quality axis. 1880 tests pass.
body.description: Give LLM the TWM snapshot and let it pull memories interactively (like Igor). Compare against current pre-built blob. Measure: response quality, tokens used, memory pulls needed. Validates TWM-view approach.
